primary.$description: Primary font family — Roboto, used across all text styles

regular.$description: Regular weight — Label Small/Medium, Body Small/Medium, Title, Headline, Display Regular styles

medium.$description: Medium weight — Label Small/Medium, Body Small/Medium, Title, Headline, Display Medium styles

semibold.$description: Semi Bold weight — Body Medium Semi Bold only

bold.$description: Semi Bold weight — Body Medium Semi Bold only

none.$description: 0px — sharp-edged table cells, dividers, full-bleed images

xs.$description: 2px — subtle rounding on tags, badges, tooltips

xl.$description: 16px — hero cards, feature panels, image containers

full.$description: 9999px — pills, avatar circles, toggle switches, status badges

default.$description: 1px — input borders, card outlines, table cell borders, dividers

thick.$description: 2px — active/selected states, tab indicators, table header borders

focus.$description: 3px — keyboard focus rings on all interactive elements

xs.$description: Subtle lift — chips, tags, small badges

sm.$description: Cards, list items, table rows on hover

md.$description: Dropdowns, popovers, date pickers, autocomplete menus

xl.$description: Full-page overlays, notification panels, floating action buttons

disabled.$description: 40% — disabled buttons, inputs, text and icons

base.$description: 0 — default stacking for standard page elements

sticky.$description: 200 — sticky headers, fixed navigation bars, sticky table columns

tooltip.$description: 500 — tooltips, always rendered above all other elements

fast.$description: 150ms — hover colour changes, button states, icon swaps

slow.$description: 500ms — page transitions, skeleton loading, progress bars

default.$description: ease-in-out — standard easing for most UI transitions

md.$description: 20px — standard UI icons in buttons, inputs and navigation

lg.$description: 24px — prominent icons in headings, empty states, feature callouts

sm.$description: 24px — avatars in table rows and compact lists

md.$description: 32px — avatars in comments, activity feeds and user mentions

lg.$description: 40px — avatars in profile headers, account cards and dashboards
